identity.mission: Create a high-performance, authoritative career tool that feels like a command center, not a generic form filler.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Graphic Design' clarity with 'Fintech' data density.
Emotion First: The user is stressed; the design must project 'Calm Confidence' and 'Precision'.
Content is King: The resume is the hero. The UI recedes to let the document shine.
Zoom In: Use focus modes for editing to eliminate distraction.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to denote luxury and clarity in the resume previews.

rules: Dashboard & Home: DARK MODE (Deep Obsidian). Purpose: Reduces eye strain, feels 'Tech/AI' powered, modern.
Resume Builder/Editor: LIGHT MODE (Paper White). Purpose: WYSIWYG accuracy. Resumes are white paper; the UI must reflect the final output context.
Landing Page: Dynamic (Dark Hero -> Light Social Proof -> Dark CTA).

usage.headings: Manrope, font-weight: 700/800, tracking-tight. Use for H1-H3 and major UI labels.
usage.body: Inter, font-weight: 400/500. Use for all resume content, form inputs, and dense text.
usage.mono: JetBrains Mono. Use for AI code snippets or 'ATS Keyword' tags.

primary.name: Deep Obsidian
primary.usage: Main background for Dashboard, Sidebar, Footer.

secondary.name: Paper White
secondary.usage: Resume Preview background, Cards in Light Mode.

accent.name: Electric Blue
accent.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, AI 'Magic' Actions.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] rounded-lg font-semibold px-8 py-3 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 text-slate-300 hover:border-slate-500 hover:text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3
buttons.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.dashboard: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-colors p-6 rounded-xl shadow-lg
cards.resume_preview: bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 aspect-[1/1.41] transform scale-[0.8] origin-top

inputs.default: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-md h-12 px-4 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600 transition-all

layout_wrappers.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto

landing_page.hero: Asymmetric split. Left: Big Text (60%). Right: Floating 3D/Abstract Elements (40%).
landing_page.features: Bento Grid (3x3). Cards with 'Tracing Beam' hover effects.

resume_builder.left_panel: Scrollable Form Area. Dark/Gray theme. 'Input Mode'.
resume_builder.right_panel: Sticky Preview Area. Light theme. 'Output Mode'. Zoom controls.

assets.icons: Use 'Lucide React' for all UI icons. Use 'Simple Icons' (via react-icons) for brand logos (LinkedIn, GitHub).

rules: Contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for all text.
Focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (Blue-500).

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients. No centered text blocks without purpose.
Micro-Interactions: Every button must click/scale. Every list item must fade in.
Data-TestID: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl for sticky navs.
